flashcards.definition: N(t) = N₀ · 2^(t/d); population doubles every d time units.
C(t) = C₀ · e⁻ᵏᵗ; drug concentration decreases exponentially.
Uses the known half-life (~5730 yr) to estimate the age of organic material.
P = Ae⁻ʳᵗ; the current worth of a future sum under continuous discounting.
V(t) = V₀(1 − r)ᵗ; models the declining value of an asset over time.
